response.justification: Candidate lacks all mandatory technical qualifications. Has only ~6 months of C++ experience from 11+ years ago (role requires 5-10 years active), no Windows platform expertise, no SQL Server/Oracle experience, and zero capital markets/fixed income domain knowledge. While communication and engineering fundamentals are strong, they cannot substitute for the core technical prerequisites that form the foundation of this role.
strengths: Excellent communication and mentoring abilities demonstrated through multiple workshops, conference talks, and team leadership roles
Strong software engineering fundamentals including TDD, CI/CD practices, and code quality focus across multiple roles
Staff-level career progression and proven ability to work across diverse technical stacks and domains
concerns: Only ~6 months of C++ experience (National Instruments, 2014-2015) versus mandatory 5-10 years of active hands-on C++ development
No demonstrated Windows platform expertise; career emphasizes Linux, web development, and cloud-native technologies
Zero exposure to capital markets, fixed income systems, investment banking, or financial derivatives; most recent finance role (RIDE Capital) was general web tech stack
